note: Condensed summary of `codex debug models` output. Full raw payload is in codex-debug-models.json.
observations: The local Codex CLI catalog (0.142.5) does not yet list the GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna preview models; hive-mind's registry already accepts them ahead of the local catalog (added in issue 1992).
Every listed model natively supports the `xhigh` reasoning effort, so hive-mind's `--think xhigh` maps 1:1 to Codex `model_reasoning_effort=xhigh`.

The GPT-5.6 Sol reasoning ladder additionally exposes `max` (above `xhigh`) and an `ultra` multi-agent mode; those are accepted by hive-mind but must be requested explicitly via `--think max` / `--think ultra`.
`none` disables reasoning entirely and is the value hive-mind emits by default (no thinking level enforced).
